A. (Almon) Richard "Dick" Turner was an expert on the Florentine Renaissance. After achieving his master's degree (and doctorate in 1959) in art history at Princeton University (NJ), Professor Turner taught at the University of Michigan, Princeton University, Middlebury College (VT), and Grinnell College (IA).
